workloads.label: Data Ingestion (Fivetran -> Snowflake)
workloads.justification: 50GB daily batch loads from 3 SQL Server DBs via Fivetran. S warehouse handles <100GB daily loads; 2hr/day batch window assumed.

workloads.label: dbt Transformations (200 models)
workloads.justification: 200 dbt models, ~45min nightly run. M warehouse for moderate ELT (50-200 models). Includes buffer for ad-hoc dbt runs.

workloads.label: Power BI DirectQuery (40 concurrent users)
workloads.justification: 40 concurrent users on Power BI DirectQuery 8am-6pm weekdays. >30 users triggers MCW. M size for standard BI; max 3 clusters handles peak concurrency.

workloads.label: Data Science / Snowpark (5 users)
workloads.justification: 5 data scientists x 2.5 hrs/day avg = 12.5 warehouse-hours/day. S warehouse for Python notebooks + Snowpark exploration.

workloads.label: Development / Sandbox (8 engineers)
workloads.justification: ASSUMPTION: 8 engineers x ~30min/day average warehouse usage = 4hr/day shared XS dev warehouse. Standard dev sandbox pattern.

snowpipe.justification: Fivetran uses Snowpipe for file-based ingestion. 50GB/day x 22 days = 1100GB/mo.

snowpipe_streaming.justification: ASSUMPTION: Year 1 batch only. Real-time fraud pipeline planned for Year 2.

serverless_tasks.justification: dbt Cloud orchestrates via Serverless Tasks. ~1hr/day x 30 days = 30 compute-hours/mo.

clustered_tables.justification: ASSUMPTION: Auto-clustering on largest fact tables to maintain query latency. ~8hr/mo background reclustering.

standard.justification: 5TB raw data stated, 30% annual growth. 3x compression (default for structured relational). 1-day time travel (Enterprise default).

assumptions: Edition: Enterprise on AWS Europe (London) at $4.00/credit (SOURCED: stated requirement).
Operating model: Weekday-only (22 days/month). No evidence of weekend processing in context.
Data Ingestion: S warehouse, 2hr/day batch window for 50GB daily Fivetran load.
Transformations: M warehouse, 1hr/day for 200 dbt models running ~45 min nightly + buffer.
Power BI: M warehouse with MCW (1-3 clusters) for 40 concurrent DirectQuery users 8am-6pm.
Data Science: S warehouse, 12.5hr/day for 5 data scientists at 2.5hr each.
Development: 8 engineers share XS dev warehouse, ~4hr/day total active time (assumption).
Snowpipe enabled for Fivetran file ingestion, 1100 GB/month (50GB x 22 days).
Serverless Tasks enabled for dbt Cloud orchestration, 30 compute-hours/month.
Auto-clustering enabled on largest fact tables, 8 compute-hours/month estimate.
Storage compression: 3x (default for structured relational data from SQL Server).
Storage growth: 30% annually (SOURCED: stated requirement).
Time travel: 1 day (Enterprise default), 10% churn rate.
AWS Europe (London) on-demand storage rate per pricing table ($24.00/TB/month).
AI/Cortex features: NOT enabled (SOURCED: 'No Snowflake AI features planned initially').
SPCS, Openflow, Postgres, Hybrid Tables: NOT enabled (no evidence in context).
Replication / Multi-region: NOT enabled (no DR or multi-region requirement stated).
Ramp curve: Linear (70% Year 1) reflecting standard new deployment.
Growth model: 30% annual growth applied uniformly Year 2 onwards.
Real-time fraud detection (Year 2 initiative): NOT yet sized; will require Snowpipe Streaming + dedicated warehouse.
Reader accounts, Native Apps, Marketplace: NOT enabled (no collaboration requirements stated).
Data transfer / Privatelink: NOT enabled (single-region deployment assumed).

confirm_required.item: Power BI concurrency: confirm 40 concurrent users is peak, not total. If peak is higher, MCW max may need to increase to 5 (impact: +30-50% on Power BI compute, ~+£40-80k Year 1).
Weekend operation: confirm no batch processing on weekends. 7-day operation would add ~36% to compute cost (~+£100k Year 1).
Year 2 real-time fraud detection: needs separate sizing. Snowpipe Streaming + dedicated S/M warehouse 24/7 could add ~£150-250k/yr starting Year 2.
Compression ratio: confirm 3x assumption with sample data. Range 2x-5x = +/-40% on storage cost (~+/-£3-5k/yr).
Snowpark workload pattern: confirm 12.5 warehouse-hours/day is correct. If sustained heavier (e.g. M size or 24-hour notebooks), could be 2-4x.
Data Science peak: confirm whether ML training will require larger warehouse (L/XL) periodically. Could add £20-40k/yr.
Dev environment usage: confirm 8 engineers x 4hr/day shared XS is sufficient. Heavier dev usage may need S warehouse.

replication.notes: ASSUMPTION: cross-region DR replica from N. Virginia to Oregon. Initial 25 TB primary, 2 TB monthly change rate. Confirm change rate via SYSTEM$ESTIMATE_REPLICATION_COST.
